meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: V2Fun
products.tagline: Generate 3D character with 8K textures and AI motion capture
products.summaryZh: 生成具有8K纹理和AI动作捕捉的3D角色
products.descriptionZh: V2Fun是一个基于自研3D建模与AI动作捕捉模型构建的AI 3D创作平台。它帮助创作者将图像、提示词和视频转化为高质量3D模型，通过先进的8K纹理生成增强资产，并创建可直接用于动画的角色，无需在独立的建模、纹理和动捕工具间切换。V2Fun还支持通过Nano Banana等模型进行图像生成，使创作者能够探索视觉概念并更快地将其转化为3D内容。
products.description: V2Fun is an AI 3D creation platform built with self-developed 3D modeling and AI motion capture models. It helps creators turn images, prompts, and videos into high-quality 3D models, enhance assets with advanced 8K texture generation, and create motion-ready characters without switching between separate modeling, texturing, and mocap tools. V2Fun also supports image generation through models including Nano Banana and others, so creators can explore visual concepts and bring them into 3D faster.

products.name: Velo 3.0
products.tagline: AI video infrastructure to explain, train, and sell faster.
products.summaryZh: AI视频基础设施，助力更快速的解释、培训与销售。
products.descriptionZh: Velo 3.0 现已发布，这是我们迄今为止第三次也是规模最大的一次更新。从屏幕录制或提示词开始，描述你需要的视频内容，Velo 将撰写脚本、用你自己的声音进行旁白，并完成最终剪辑。它基于你的公司知识库——包括你的文档以及通过连接器和MCP接入的工具——确保内容贴合实际。通过输入修改即可编辑视频。一键将完成的视频本地化为25种以上语言。无论是录制还是提示词，Velo都能将其转化为精良的视频，供你在任何平台发布。
products.description: Velo 3.0 is here, our third and biggest launch yet. Start with a screen recording or a prompt. Describe the video you need, and Velo writes the script, narrates it in your own voice, and builds the finished cut. It stays grounded in your company knowledge, from your docs and tools you connect through connectors and MCP. Edit by typing changes. Localize the finished video into 25+ languages in one click. Recording or prompt, Velo turns either into a polished video you can ship anywhere.

products.name: Campus
products.tagline: One project space for humans and AI agents
products.summaryZh: 一个人工智能与人类共享的项目空间
products.descriptionZh: Campus为构建者提供了与队友和AI智能体共同构建的共享空间。将你的仓库、终端、项目知识、对话和智能体工作整合在一个持久的工作区中，而非分散在Slack线程、文档、工单、画布和一次性AI聊天中。Campus围绕你正在构建的内容进行组织，使人类和智能体能够从工作中断处继续推进。
products.description: Campus gives builders a shared space to build with teammates and AI agents. Keep your repo, terminal, project knowledge, conversations, and agent work together in one persistent workspace, instead of scattering context across Slack threads, docs, tickets, canvases, and one-off AI chats. Campus is organized around the thing you are building, so humans and agents can pick up where the work left off.

products.name: Agently
products.tagline: Your whole stack, running itself!
products.summaryZh: 你的整个技术栈，自动运行！
products.descriptionZh: 其他工具只会回答、检索或执行僵硬的规则。Agently 将整个公司置于上下文中，并完成工作。100多个连接器汇入一个永不遗忘的大脑。它能自动将 Stripe 事件关联到 Slack 线程，再关联到 Linear 工单。当有任务需要执行时，Jarvis 会将其路由到某个代理，由该代理端到端完成：触发、运行、交付。工作无需你介入即可落地，没有任何遗漏。连接只需几分钟。这是连接今日AI与明日AGI的中间层。
products.description: Every other tool answers, retrieves, or runs brittle rules. Agently holds your whole company in context and does the work. 100+ connectors flow into one brain that never forgets. It links a Stripe event to a Slack thread to a Linear ticket on its own. When something needs doing, Jarvis routes it to an agent that runs it end to end: triggered, running, shipped. The work lands without you, nothing falls through the cracks. Connecting takes minutes. The layer between today's AI and tomorrow's AGI.

products.name: Crustdata Recruiter
products.tagline: Claude Skills to turn Claude into a 100x Recruiter
products.summaryZh: Claude技能，将Claude打造成百倍效率的招聘官
products.descriptionZh: 一套在Claude上运行的招聘技能，基于Crustdata提供的10亿+个人资料实时数据。它通过每次搜索学习你的判断标准，按你的方式对候选人进行排序，解释它选择的每位候选人，并将外联草稿导入你的ATS系统。
products.description: A set of recruiting skills that runs inside Claude on live data from 1B+ profiles from Crustdata. It learns your judgement with every search, ranks candidates the way you would, explains every candidate it picks, and drafts outreach into your ATS.

products.name: Flodesk Studio
products.tagline: A place to make beautiful emails.
products.summaryZh: 制作精美邮件的地方。
products.descriptionZh: 描述它，Flodesk Studio 即可在数秒内设计出符合品牌调性的精美邮件。由顶尖设计师构建，经AI加速，由你最终完成。测试版免费使用。
products.description: Describe it, and Flodesk Studio designs a beautifully on-brand email in seconds. Built by top designers, accelerated by AI, finished by you. Free in beta.

products.name: YAGNI
products.tagline: Proactive agent teams you manage like humans
products.summaryZh: 主动式智能体团队，像管理人类一样管理。
products.descriptionZh: 如今的AI是被动的：它等待你的下一个指令。而YAGNI是主动的智能体团队，像管理人类一样管理团队。为团队分配职责与边界，审核其工作成果，它便能通过你可追溯的业绩记录赢得自主权，而你只需保留关键决策权。粘贴公司网址，YAGNI数秒内即可为你起草首个团队。你不需要更多软件，你需要一个每周都在进步的团队。成为一家自我进化的公司。
products.description: AI today is reactive: it waits for your next prompt. YAGNI is proactive agent Teams you manage like people. Give a Team responsibilities and guardrails, review its work, and it earns autonomy through a track record you can read, while you keep the calls that matter. Paste your company's URL and YAGNI drafts your first team in seconds. You aren't gonna need more software. You need a team that gets better every week. Become a self-improving company.

products.name: Tiptap AI Toolkit
products.tagline: Empower your AI to directly edit documents in real time.
products.summaryZh: 让您的AI实时直接编辑文档。
products.descriptionZh: AI Toolkit 现已进入生产就绪的测试阶段——我们为100位开发者提供免费终身授权。聊天机器人容易实现，但在富文本文档中实时编辑却出奇困难。省去数月的工程开发：Tiptap 在您的 AI 与团队实际工作的文档之间，构建了安全可靠的桥梁。注册 Tiptap 账户并参与我们的赠品活动：100 位用户将获得免费的终身 AI Toolkit 授权（每月 10 万次工具调用），作为反馈的交换。
products.description: AI Toolkit is now in production-ready beta — and we’re giving 100 builders a free lifetime license. Chatbots are easy. Editing inside a rich-text doc in real time is deceptively hard. Skip months of engineering: Tiptap delivers a safe, reliable bridge between your AI and the documents where your team actually does its work. Sign up for a Tiptap account and join our giveaway: 100 users get a free, lifetime AI Toolkit license (100k tool calls/mo) in exchange for feedback.

products.name: RecordMeeting
products.tagline: Record and transcribe any calls without announcement
products.summaryZh: 在未告知的情况下录制和转录任何通话。
products.descriptionZh: 私密记录和转录通话 🥷 无机器人加入，无录音提示。自动生成转录文本、摘要、可搜索笔记、关键要点及可分享的团队链接。支持 Google Meet、Zoom、WhatsApp、Microsoft Teams、Webex、Telegram 和 Discord。立即免费试用。
products.description: Records and transcribes your calls privately 🥷 No bots joining and No recording announcements. Get automatic transcripts, summaries, searchable notes, key points, and a shareable team link. Works with Google Meet, Zoom, WhatsApp, Microsoft Teams, Webex, Telegram, and Discord. Try it free today.

products.name: CodeNearby 2.0
products.tagline: Tinder for developers! Find coding partners & build together
products.summaryZh: 开发者版Tinder！寻找编程伙伴，一起构建项目
products.descriptionZh: CodeNearby 是一个面向开发者的开源社交网络。你可以根据技能、兴趣或位置寻找编程伙伴，进行实时聊天、分享动态、举办线上聚会，并通过 AI-Connect 以自然对话的方式发现协作者。支持 GitHub 驱动的个人资料，覆盖全球范围，聚焦本地连接。
products.description: CodeNearby is open-source social network built for developers. Find coding partners by skill, interest, or location, chat real-time, share updates, host virtual meetups, and use AI-Connect to discover collaborators through natural conversation. GitHub-powered profiles, global reach, local focus.

products.name: Review by Eddie AI
products.tagline: Time-stamped feedback on your video frm your team & AI. Free
products.summaryZh: 来自团队和AI的视频时间戳反馈。免费。
products.descriptionZh: Eddie Review 是获取剪辑反馈最快的方式，只需几分钟。无需登录、无需重新上传、完全免费。收集团队逐帧精准的评论，获取 AI 对剪辑的审阅，并将每条意见转化为可执行的任务清单。
products.description: Eddie Review is the fastest way to get feedback on your cut, in minutes. No login, no re-upload, free. Collect frame-accurate comments from your team, get an AI review of your edit, and turn every note into a to-do list you can act on.

products.name: nudge2.0
products.tagline: AI schedules your whole week to take action
products.summaryZh: AI 为你规划整周行动
products.descriptionZh:
别管。只管做。nudge 规划你的一周，你无需动手——  
别创建。输入纯文本——AI 将其转化为带截止日期的真实任务。  
别规划你的一天。一键操作，AI 围绕睡眠、用餐和固定事件自动排程。  
别放过自己。为截止日期锁定 5 美元。完成并证明——你无需付费。  
别切换应用。从 Slack 和 Discord 中捕捉并重新安排。  
别迷失方向。一个工作区。首月 5 美元，之后每月 20 美元。由东京一名 20 岁工程系学生独立开发。
products.description: Don't manage. Just do. nudge plans your week so you don't have to - Don't create. Type plain text — AI turns it into real tasks with deadlines. - Don't plan your day. One click, AI schedules around sleep, meals, and fixed events. - Don't let yourself off. Lock $5 on a deadline. Finish and prove it — you pay nothing. - Don't switch apps. Capture and reschedule from Slack & Discord. - Don't get lost. One workspace. $5 first month, then $20/mo. Solo-built by a 20yo engineering student in Tokyo.

products.name: Copresent
products.tagline: Turn your phone into a Google Slides remote
products.summaryZh: 将手机变为Google Slides遥控器
products.descriptionZh: Copresent 可将手机变为 Google Slides 遥控器——滑动翻页，屏幕显示备注。需要协同演示？分享一个链接，最多 10 人可从任意设备操控同一份演示文稿。访客无需安装应用或注册账户。
products.description: Copresent turns your phone into a Google Slides remote - swipe to advance, notes on screen. Need to co-present? Share one link and up to 10 people drive the same deck from any device. No app or account for guests.

products.name: Keepresso
products.tagline: Keep your Mac awake, on your terms. Free and open source
products.summaryZh: 按需保持 Mac 唤醒。免费且开源。
products.descriptionZh: 你的Mac在下载、渲染或运行代理任务中途进入休眠。Keepresso通过智能触发器、定时会话、合盖模式及无头Mac工具包，精准保持其清醒。原生菜单栏应用。免费开源，支持macOS 14+。
products.description: Your Mac sleeps mid-download, mid-render, mid-agent-run. Keepresso keeps it awake exactly when it should, with smart triggers, timed sessions, closed-display mode, and a headless-Mac toolkit. Native menu-bar app. Free, open source, macOS 14+.

products.name: Clerk | AI Assistant for Cap Tables
products.tagline: Issue grants, model funding rounds, ask it anything equity
products.summaryZh: 发放股权、模拟融资轮次、随时提问
products.descriptionZh: 你的股东名册信息散落在各处：律师的脑海里、法务助理的收件箱中、风投机构数十年积累的认知模型里。Mantle Clerk 将这些知识汇聚于你手中。提出问题、上传文件、描述刚刚完成的交易，Mantle Clerk 便会给出解答、记录信息并起草后续文件。
products.description: Everything you need to know about your cap table lives somewhere: in your lawyer's head, in a paralegal's inbox, in a VC's mental model built over decades. Mantle Clerk puts that knowledge in your corner. Ask a question, drop in a document, describe what just closed, and Mantle Clerk answers, records, and drafts what comes next.

products.name: ccshare
products.tagline: multiplayer claude code
products.summaryZh: 多人模式 Claude Code
products.descriptionZh: 用6位代码分享你的Claude Code实时会话，类似AirDrop风格。你的朋友从终端加入——或直接在浏览器中打开链接，无需安装任何东西——就能看到你的确切屏幕，双方均可输入。通过WiFi即可零配置使用，或通过免费隧道在任何地方连接。
products.description: share your live Claude Code session with a 6-char code, AirDrop-style. your friend joins from their terminal - or just opens a link in their browser, nothing to install - sees your exact screen, and both of you can type. works over your wifi with zero setup, or anywhere through a free tunnel.

products.name: New AI tools by IFTTT
products.tagline: Automate with Grok, Gemini, Perplexity, and more
products.summaryZh: 使用 Grok、Gemini、Perplexity 等工具实现自动化
products.descriptionZh: 十款热议AI工具现已登陆IFTTT。会议结束后即刻生成摘要，转录音频并自动发送至指定位置，按计划生成图像，并将AI响应直接路由至您已使用的应用程序。只需设置一次，即可在条件满足时自动运行。无论您是开发者、内容创作者，还是厌倦手动操作的用户，这里都有适合您的工具。可将其与Google Drive、Notion、Slack、短信等连接使用。
products.description: Ten of the most talked-about AI tools just landed on IFTTT. Summarize meetings the moment they end, transcribe audio and send it where it needs to go, generate images on a schedule, and get AI responses routed straight to the apps you already use. Set it up once and it runs every time the conditions are met. Whether you're a developer, a content creator, or just someone tired of doing things manually, there's something here for you. Hook it all up to Google Drive, Notion, Slack, SMS, and more.

products.name: DeskMat 1.3
products.tagline: Now hide individual files + folders for more private desktop
products.summaryZh: 现在隐藏单个文件和文件夹，让桌面更私密
products.descriptionZh: 把东西扫到地毯下——虚拟的那种。DeskMat 是一款虚拟桌垫，只需点击一下按钮，就能覆盖桌面上杂乱的文件夹和文件。用于更干净的直播画面、视频会议和屏幕共享时保护隐私，以及无干扰地工作！
products.description: Sweep things under the rug – virtually. DeskMat is your virtual mat that covers your mess of files and folders on your Desktop with the click of a button. For cleaner streams, more privacy during video conferences, screen sharing, and distraction-free work!

products.name: QuickQuill
products.tagline: Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac
products.summaryZh: Mac 端私密设备内会议笔记
products.descriptionZh: QuickQuill 录制会议并生成文字记录与摘要，所有内容均不会上传至云端。无需机器人加入通话，即便关闭 Wi-Fi 也能正常使用——演示视频正是以此方式录制。录制时支持实时字幕及翻译，并可在任意应用中通过按键启动听写功能。无需注册账户，无需订阅服务。听写功能永久免费，仅需一次性支付 49 美元即可解锁完整会议工作流。需搭载 Apple Silicon 芯片的 macOS 26 系统。
products.description: QuickQuill records your meetings and turns them into transcripts and summaries, and nothing is ever sent to the cloud. No bot joins the call, and it keeps working with Wi-Fi off, which is how the demo video was recorded. It also shows live subtitles with translation while you record, and there's push-to-talk dictation for any app. No account, no subscription. Dictation is free forever, and a single $49 purchase unlocks the full meeting workflow. Requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon.

products.name: Jam-Pod
products.tagline: A player for people who keep their own music collection
products.summaryZh: 为拥有个人音乐收藏的人打造的播放器
products.descriptionZh: Jam-Pod 是一款无干扰音乐播放器，采用摇杆操控的单色界面。没有信息流，没有算法，只有你的音乐库。在一个屏幕上即可播放本地 Apple Music、高解析度无损文件（FLAC、WAV、ALAC）、Apple Music 曲库和播客。支持自定义与智能播放列表、复古配色主题、触感导航。让音乐回归，而非又一个需要滑动浏览的信息流。
products.description: Jam-Pod is a distraction-free music player with a joystick-driven, monochrome interface. No feed, no algorithm, just your library. Play local Apple Music, hi-res lossless files (FLAC, WAV, ALAC), Apple Music catalog, and podcasts — all from one screen. Custom and smart playlists, retro color themes, haptic navigation. Your music back, not another feed to scroll.
